description: A plain candid arrest photograph (no design overlay or on-image text). It shows a man in a camouflage hooded jacket and a dark ball cap (a 'TY-KU' logo cap) standing with his hands apparently restrained behind his back, flanked by plainclothes officers at what appears to be an airport curb/terminal exterior. One officer at right wears an olive hoodie with an 'HSI C.N.T' badge on a neck lanyard; another officer in dark clothing stands at left, and a blonde person stands behind. The arrestee's and officers' faces are blurred/pixelated. Per the tweet, this is Mihaly Bodner, a Hungarian national arrested at Newark Liberty International Airport. There is no agency branding, slogan, or graphic styling on the image itself, so it is a routine documentary enforcement photo rather than a designed meme.
